title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India Advisory Limited:
Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
